name: badshuffle
description: Self-hosted event rental software for inventory management, project quotes, pull sheets, approvals, messaging, team operations, and public catalog publishing.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "node scripts/wait-for-server.js && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev:rust" "node scripts/wait-for-server.js && npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:host: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "node scripts/wait-for-server.js && npm run dev --prefix client -- --host"
scripts.dev:stack:host: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev:rust" "node scripts/wait-for-server.js && npm run dev --prefix client -- --host"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.package: npm run check:rust:release && npm run build:client && npm run package:server && npm run package:client && npm run package:updater && node scripts/postpackage.js
scripts.release: npm run package && gh release create v%npm_package_version% dist/badshuffle-server.exe dist/badshuffle-client.exe dist/badshuffle-updater.exe dist/www.zip dist/badshuffle-extension.zip --title v%npm_package_version% --notes ""
